ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* GPS coordinates (latitude and longitude) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., lake, river, ocean) */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was established */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Current status of the site (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "var_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variable measured */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the measurement collection period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the measurement collection period */,
  "n_meas" INTEGER /* Total number of measurements taken */,
  "n_meas5" INTEGER /* Number of measurements processed using a 5-point method */,
  "min_val" REAL /* Minimum value recorded for the measurement */,
  "max_val" REAL /* Maximum value recorded for the measurement */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement method used */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurements */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_var_id FOREIGN KEY ("var_id") REFERENCES variables ("var_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES measurement_libraries ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "var_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "var_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable measured (e.g., NH4N, CHLA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable and its significance */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("var_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., Water Quality, Air Quality) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Typical frequency of measurements for this type */,
  "recommended_methods" TEXT /* Recommended measurement methods for this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality assessment */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score representing the quality of the measurement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about data quality */,
  "quality_method" TEXT /* Method used to assess data quality */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reviewed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., computer, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the method entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the method corresponds to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement method */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Standard protocol for the measurement method */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the method */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the method */,
  "method_author" TEXT /* Author of the method */,
  "method_publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the method was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_libraries_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the summary entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where measurements were taken */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "average" REAL /* Average value of the measurement */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the measurement values */,
  "median" REAL /* Median value of the measurement */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the measurement values */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used in the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_summary_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the measurement */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding changes or updates in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement associated with the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert issued */,
  "date_triggered" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details regarding the action taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, bug report) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
